response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of staff-level technical strategy in AI-native environments, has no demonstrated Python mastery (only DLang/TypeScript), and his resume is cluttered with unrelated roles and unverified claims (e.g., Kenya-based companies with no public trace).
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong systems thinking with distributed systems and high-throughput workloads
Active open-source contributor with operational tooling and DevOps experience
concerns: No demonstrated Python expertise — critical for the role
Ambiguous employment history with unverifiable company locations and roles
Lacks clear evidence of technical strategy ownership at staff level in AI-driven engineering contexts
